programs.title: Explore TV
programs.desc: Explore TV takes you around the world to places you'll never forget.

programs.title: Barbie: Dreamhouse Adventures
programs.desc: When they get into a fight, Barbie volunteers to swap rooms with her sisters Skipper and Stacie. Eventually all of the Roberts sisters learn no roommate is perfect.

programs.title: Barney's World
programs.desc: Barney helps David and Vivie plan something nice for Mel after she breaks her arm; Mel is upset because there are certain things she cannot do with a cast, so Barney comes up with a game that helps Mel accept her abilities with help from a robot arm.

programs.title: LEGO DreamZzz
programs.desc: The dream chasers hunt for Lunia's hourglass, which they believe will help them defeat the evil Dreamsmasher.

programs.title: Bubble's Hotel
programs.desc: Bubble triggers a dangerous mudslide by trying to please two opposing guests. / When Sadie builds Superina a robot sidekick, its giant springy legs are too much to control - and Bubble must find a way to combine her guest's talents to save the day.

programs.title: Beyblade Burst Quadstrike
programs.desc: The stage is set for a masquerade tournament, but the Dark Prince isn't the only belle at this ball! Enter: the masked Blader known as 'Quadra.' Wielding her elemental Bey, Lightning Pandora, Quadra has defeated every foe to come her way.
